  directory to understand the current
  progress of the porting project and
  identify areas for improvement or
  missing components.

✦ I'll examine the r8_go/src/dex
  directory to assess the current
  implementation status of the Dex graph
  nodes and identify any missing
  components.

╭───────────────────────────────────╮
│ ✓  ReadFolder r8_go/src/dex       │
│                                   │
│ Listed 77 item(s).                │
╰───────────────────────────────────╯
✦ I noticed that while test files for
  DexItemFactory and DexMemberFactory
  exist in r8_go/src/dex, the
  corresponding implementation files
  appear to be missing. I'll examine
  dex_string.go to understand its current
  implementation and clarify the
  situation.

╭───────────────────────────────────╮
│ ✓  ReadFile r8_go/src/dex/dex_st… │
│                                   │
╰───────────────────────────────────╯
✦ r8_go/src/dex/dex_string.go currently
  houses several major types, including
  DexString, DexType, DexProto,
  DexMethod, DexField, and
  DexItemFactory, which makes the file
  excessively large. I plan to refactor
  these into separate files to better
  align with Go's best practices.
  Additionally, I'll verify if
  r8_go/src/utils/descriptor.go exists,
  as it's a dependency for the
  ToSourceString method.
╭───────────────────────────────────╮
│ ✓  ReadFolder r8_go/src/utils     │
│                                   │
│ Listed 68 item(s).                │
╰───────────────────────────────────╯
✦ I've noted that
  utils.DescriptorToJavaType is used in
  dex_string.go, so I'll examine
  r8_go/src/utils/descriptor_utils.go to
  confirm its implementation.
